Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 21 

BENE_STATE_CD 

LABEL: Beneficiary State 

DESCRIPTION: The state code for the beneficiary. 

LONG NAME: BENE_STATE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: Two-character postal state code 
AE = US Armed Forces in Europe, the 
Middle East, Africa and Canada 
AK = Alaska 
AL = Alabama 
AR = Arkansas 
AS = American Samoa 
AZ = Arizona 
CA = California 
CO =
